issues.message: GridItem is NOT publicly exported from @gravity-ui/dashkit (not in components/index.ts or src/index.ts). Data file claims it can be imported via `import { GridItem } from '@gravity-ui/dashkit'` but this is incorrect - it is an internal component.

GridLayout is NOT publicly exported from @gravity-ui/dashkit. Data file claims it can be imported via `import { GridLayout } from '@gravity-ui/dashkit'` but this is incorrect - it is an internal component used only by DashKitView.

Item is NOT publicly exported from @gravity-ui/dashkit. Data file claims it can be imported via `import { Item } from '@gravity-ui/dashkit'` but this is incorrect - it is an internal component used only by GridItem and MobileLayout.

MobileLayout is NOT publicly exported from @gravity-ui/dashkit. Data file claims it can be imported via `import { MobileLayout } from '@gravity-ui/dashkit'` but this is incorrect - it is an internal component used only by DashKitView.

OverlayControls is NOT publicly exported as a component from @gravity-ui/dashkit. Only the types OverlayControlItem and PreparedCopyItemOptions are exported from OverlayControls.tsx. The component itself is an internal default export used by GridItem.

useCalcPropsLayout hook is NOT publicly exported from @gravity-ui/dashkit (hooks directory is not re-exported from src/index.ts). Data file claims it can be imported via `import { useCalcPropsLayout } from '@gravity-ui/dashkit'` but this is incorrect - it is an internal hook used by DashKitView.

useDeepEqualMemo hook is NOT publicly exported from @gravity-ui/dashkit (hooks directory is not re-exported from src/index.ts). Data file claims it can be imported via `import { useDeepEqualMemo } from '@gravity-ui/dashkit'` but this is incorrect - it is an internal utility hook.

useDnDItemProps hook is NOT publicly exported from @gravity-ui/dashkit (hooks directory is not re-exported from src/index.ts). Data file claims it can be imported via `import { useDnDItemProps } from '@gravity-ui/dashkit'` but this is incorrect - it is an internal hook used by ActionPanelItemContainer.

Item component is wrapped by prepareItem HOC (`export default prepareItem(Item)`), so the actual component interface differs from the raw ItemProps. The data file documents raw inner props (registerManager, rendererProps) which are injected by the HOC, not passed by consumers.

GridItem is exported as a forwardRef wrapper (GridItemForwarderRef) that forwards ref as forwardedRef. Data file lists props without forwardedRef but includes several missing props from the source: children, className, style, onMouseDown, onMouseUp, onTouchEnd, onTouchStart (injected by react-grid-layout).

GridLayout props documented as only having `ref`. In reality it uses GridLayoutProps type (imported from ./types.ts) which is a separate interface, not just a ref. The data file materially misrepresents the component interface.

Data file does not document static methods: DashKit.registerPlugins(), DashKit.reloadPlugins(), DashKit.setSettings(), DashKit.setItem(), DashKit.removeItem(), DashKit.reflowLayout(). These are important parts of the public API. Also missing instance methods: getItemsMeta(), reloadItems().
Description says 'Supports drag-and-drop via useDnDItemProps hook' which is accurate, but does not mention that it also renders onClick handler and data-qa attribute from the item prop.

Description says 'Manages drag state and provides a custom drag image preview' which is accurate but incomplete - it also wraps children in DashKitDnDContext.Provider, which is the key mechanism enabling cross-instance DnD.
